calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, American Express Bank, FSB, a federal savings bank; American Express Centurion Bank, a Utah State Chartered Bank
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Abel Padilla, aka Abel G. Padilla, aka Abel Radilla, an individual.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $36,815.57
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $555.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $37,370.57
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Jun-13-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2016 Continued To Jan-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
